description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named pr that triggers on push to branches matching pull-request/[0-9]+. Use a concurrency group that cancels in-progress jobs. Define a pr-builder job that depends on multiple other jobs (checks, conda-cpp-build, conda-cpp-tests, conda-python-build, conda-python-tests, docs-build, wheel-build, wheel-tests, devcontainer) and uses a shared workflow from rapidsai/shared-workflows.
